notes: Secondary market listing counts. Key Track B indicator. Trend more important than absolute value — watch for sustained increases (sellers fleeing) or collapse to zero (market frozen).

alert_thresholds.notes: Surge threshold = 50% above current baseline. Collapse threshold = 75% below. Either condition triggers alert in compute.py.

readings.note: MONITOR: Luhansk listing surge (+118, +14%) concurrent with RPI/CCI spike week (Mariupol port disabled, R-280 -71%, Sevastopol fuel rationing). First Track B-adjacent movement in dataset. Monitor next 2-3 readings for sustained trend vs. one-time data artifact — sustained increase would indicate seller flight beginning.

mariupol.notes: Secondary market thin — new build dominant. Домклик presence limited. GID.HOUSE is primary source for Mariupol.
